articles.title: SEC Appoints John Moses as Director of the Office of Investor Education and Assistance
articles.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission has appointed John Moses as Director of the agency’s Office of Investor Education and Assistance, which provides services and resources to he

articles.title: U.S. and Iran agree on peace deal to end the war, Trump and Pakistan say
articles.summary: The deal follows weeks of mixed messaging from both Washington and Tehran on the trajectory of the conflict.

articles.title: Oil executives send a blunt message to Americans on gas prices
Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Isn’t Worried About the Chip Rout. The Numbers Back Him Up on NVDA Stock.
标普500集中度达历史高点，这样的美股有哪些风险？
articles.summary: 伍治坚：今天的标普500已经不只是一个“500家公司”的简单组合。它越来越像一个由少数超级赢家主导、由AI和科技资本开支叙事支撑的市场组合。

articles.title: A year after Meta tapped Alexandr Wang to build a new AI model, Zuckerberg has to sell it
articles.summary: Mark Zuckerberg's mega spending spree began a year ago, when he lured Alexandr Wang to oversee a new AI strategy. The results so far are underwhelming.

articles.title: World leaders welcome U.S.-Iran deal as Europe signals sanctions relief, urges Hormuz reopening
articles.summary: The agreement came after more than three months of stop-start negotiations and bouts of fighting since late February, roiling global energy and commodities markets.

articles.title: Jim Cramer Wasn’t Selling Eli Lilly (LLY)
Millions of people can get discounts on their bills - here's how
articles.summary: Lower social tariffs allow many people on benefits to get cheaper deals for water, broadband and phone.

articles.title: Elon Musk drifted from Larry Page over a decade ago, but their companies are closer than ever
articles.summary: SpaceX and Google have a long and complicated relationship, but they were both celebrating this week after Elon Musk's company held its blockbuster IPO.

articles.title: 一周世界舆论聚焦：美伊战争即将结束与韩国的明智决策
articles.summary: 曹辛：美伊达成结束战争协议前景看好，双方都不愿意再打下去了。韩国政府对中国领导人访朝做出的判断和决策，有利于朝鲜半岛和平与稳定。

articles.title: 调查：能源危机促使企业加快电气化
articles.summary: 自中东能源危机爆发以来最大规模的企业调查之一发现，地缘政治不稳定使得五分之四的企业高管认为电气化变得更加紧迫。

articles.title: FT社评：凯文•沃什正式登场
articles.summary: 美联储新主席本周将主持他的首次利率决策会议。他最好与大多数理事一起投票维持利率不变，以表明他对美国央行独立性的承诺。

topic_checks.conflict_detail: 数值方向矛盾: 「revenue growth in the first quarter, the fastest rate of expansion for any perio」vs「利润率和竞争风险。但如果它们的股价越来越受同一个主题影响，那么分散效果就会下降。投资者以为自己买了十家公司，实际上可能买的是同一个大方向：那就是期望AI和科技资」

claims.context: - **能源成本预期骤降**: 美伊停战协议核心指向霍尔木兹海峡重启，结束了长达数月威胁全球20%石油供应的航运阻塞。据报道，原油期货价格已在盘后大幅下跌【新闻6145】，能源板块面临显著的下行压力。
